description: Submits a scheduled delegation System Call for future OpenMAS OS execution.

whenToUse: The user asks to schedule a future delegation to Bruce or another Operational Identity.
whenNotToUse: The user asks for immediate delegation.
exampleRequests: Schedule Bruce to inspect this habitat one minute from now.
Alfred, schedule Bruce through the OpenMAS OS using mas.os.schedule_delegation with an explicit future runAt.

highConfidenceSignals: The request includes schedule, later, at a time, or one minute from now and asks another Operational Identity to work.
ambiguitySignals: The request mentions time but not a target Operational Identity.
negativeSignals: The request asks to run immediately.
